architecture.kind: N3 recurrent direct-render MLP — v3 arch + SPATIAL FIREFLY LOSS

gate: presents ONLY if real_image_ordeal writes a PASS stamp beside this file

firefly_loss.form: MSE + ff_w·Σ_c relu(out_c − teacher_kxk_max_c − margin)² in demod-log space
firefly_loss.note: penalises isolated bright outliers over dark teacher neighbourhoods; bright edges (high cap) free

training.monitor: ordeal sparkle metric on held-out val pose orbit_-20, early-stop under bar with margin
